name: pack4-compose-browser-session-stop-delete
command:
bash -lc $'
set -euo pipefail
ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)
API_PORT=$(grep -E "^API_GATEWAY_HOST_PORT=" "$ROOT/.env" | cut -d= -f2)
RUNTIME_PORT=$(grep -E "^RUNTIME_API_PORT=" "$ROOT/.env" | cut -d= -f2)
API_KEY=$(grep -E "^VEXA_API_KEY=" "$ROOT/.env" | tail -1 | cut -d= -f2)
if [ -z "$API_KEY" ]; then echo "missing VEXA_API_KEY" >&2; exit 1; fi
CREATE_JSON=$(curl -fsS -X POST "http://localhost:${API_PORT}/bots" -H "X-API-Key: ${API_KEY}" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d "{\"mode\":\"browser_session\"}")
MEETING_ID=$(printf "%s" "$CREATE_JSON" | jq -r ".id")
NATIVE_ID=$(printf "%s" "$CREATE_JSON" | jq -r ".native_meeting_id")
if [ -z "$MEETING_ID" ] || [ "$MEETING_ID" = "null" ] || [ -z "$NATIVE_ID" ] || [ "$NATIVE_ID" = "null" ]; then echo "failed to parse create response" >&2; exit 1; fi
echo "created browser_session meeting_id=${MEETING_ID} native_id=${NATIVE_ID}"
curl -fsS -X DELETE "http://localhost:${API_PORT}/bots/browser_session/${NATIVE_ID}" -H "X-API-Key: ${API_KEY}" >/dev/null
echo "delete accepted"
STATUS=""
CONTAINER=""
for i in $(seq 1 60); do
  ROW=$(docker compose --env-file "$ROOT/.env" -f "$ROOT/deploy/compose/docker-compose.yml" exec -T postgres psql -U postgres -d vexa -tAc "select status || coalesce(' $' || bot_container_id, ) from meetings where id=${MEETING_ID};" | tr -d "\r" | xargs || true)
  STATUS=$(printf "%s" "$ROW" | awk "{print \$1}")
  CONTAINER=$(printf "%s" "$ROW" | awk "{print \$2}")
  echo "poll=${i} status=${STATUS:-unknown} container=${CONTAINER:-none}"
  if [ "$STATUS" = "completed" ] || [ "$STATUS" = "failed" ]; then break; fi
  sleep 2
done
if [ "$STATUS" != "completed" ] && [ "$STATUS" != "failed" ]; then echo "meeting did not reach terminal status" >&2; exit 1; fi
if [ -n "$CONTAINER" ] && [ "$CONTAINER" != "none" ]; then
  HTTP=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" "http://localhost:${RUNTIME_PORT}/containers/${CONTAINER}" || true)
  echo "runtime_container_http=${HTTP}"
  if [ "$HTTP" = "200" ]; then echo "runtime still reports container" >&2; exit 1; fi
fi
'
result: compose browser_session stop/delete reached terminal state

name: pack4-hardenloop
command:
bash -lc $'
set -euo pipefail
target="/home/dima/dev/vexa-pack-0.10.6x-pack-4-stop-delete-lifecycle-convergence"
out="/home/dima/dev/vexa-agents-pack-pipeline-strategy/.agents/packs/0.10.6x-pack-4-stop-delete-lifecycle-convergence/hardenloop/run"
config="/home/dima/dev/vexa-agents-pack-pipeline-strategy/.agents/skills/hardenloop/references/vexa-release.toml"
stash="$(mktemp -d /tmp/vexa-pack4-hardenloop.XXXXXX)"
items=(".env" "services/vexa-bot/node_modules" "services/vexa-bot/core/node_modules")
restore() {
  for rel in "${items[@]}"; do
    if [ -e "$stash/$rel" ]; then
      mkdir -p "$target/$(dirname "$rel")"
      mv "$stash/$rel" "$target/$rel"
    fi
  done
  rm -rf "$stash"
}
trap restore EXIT
for rel in "${items[@]}"; do
  if [ -e "$target/$rel" ]; then
    mkdir -p "$stash/$(dirname "$rel")"
    mv "$target/$rel" "$stash/$rel"
  fi
done
cd "$target"
/home/dima/dev/vexa-i-adversarial-harness/.venv/bin/hardenloop release . --mode oss-release --cycles 1 --fix none --out "$out" --config "$config" --timeout-seconds 180
'
hypothesis: Pack 4 tracked code has no release-blocking security findings after lifecycle callback changes.
result: Hardenloop release hardening completed for Pack 4.
next: Summarize hardening decision in pack evidence.

name: pack4-compose-build-lifecycle-services
command:
bash -lc $'
set -euo pipefail
ROOT="/home/dima/dev/vexa-pack-0.10.6x-pack-4-stop-delete-lifecycle-convergence"
TAG="0.10.6-pack4-$(date -u +%y%m%d-%H%M)"
echo "$TAG" > "$ROOT/deploy/compose/.pack4-lifecycle-tag"
chmod a+r "$ROOT/services/runtime-api/profiles.yaml"
cd "$ROOT/deploy/compose"
IMAGE_TAG="$TAG" docker compose --env-file "$ROOT/.env" -f "$ROOT/deploy/compose/docker-compose.yml" build runtime-api meeting-api
IMAGE_TAG="$TAG" docker compose --env-file "$ROOT/.env" -f "$ROOT/deploy/compose/docker-compose.yml" up -d --no-deps runtime-api meeting-api
for i in $(seq 1 30); do
  runtime_ok=0
  meeting_ok=0
  if IMAGE_TAG="$TAG" docker compose --env-file "$ROOT/.env" -f "$ROOT/deploy/compose/docker-compose.yml" exec -T runtime-api python -c "import httpx; httpx.get('http://localhost:8090/health').raise_for_status()" >/dev/null 2>&1; then runtime_ok=1; fi
  if IMAGE_TAG="$TAG" docker compose --env-file "$ROOT/.env" -f "$ROOT/deploy/compose/docker-compose.yml" exec -T meeting-api python -c "import urllib.request; urllib.request.urlopen('http://localhost:8080/health')" >/dev/null 2>&1; then meeting_ok=1; fi
  echo "poll=$i runtime_ok=$runtime_ok meeting_ok=$meeting_ok"
  if [ "$runtime_ok" = 1 ] && [ "$meeting_ok" = 1 ]; then break; fi
  sleep 2
done
if [ "$runtime_ok" != 1 ] || [ "$meeting_ok" != 1 ]; then
  echo "lifecycle services did not become healthy" >&2
  exit 1
fi
'
hypothesis: The lifecycle-owning Compose services build from Pack 4 source under an isolated image tag.
result: Built Pack 4 meeting-api and runtime-api images from source.
next: Restart isolated Compose lifecycle services and rerun stop/delete convergence.
